_comment: Least-privilege IAM policy for the luke-core-engine S3DocumentStore (DOCUMENTS layer). Replace BUCKET_NAME with the env bucket (e.g. luke-docstore-prod). One policy per bucket/env. Grants exactly what the engine needs: object RW + delete, per-object Object-Lock retention (set on signature PUTs), and bucket listing. NO bucket-admin, NO policy/ACL/encryption-config changes, NO cross-bucket access.
